headline: Jim Cramer Calls Walmart Stock’s Decline “Excessive”
summary: Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) was among the stocks Jim Cramer commented on as he advised investors on how to take advantage of Wednesday’s market rotation. Cramer highlighted the stock’s recent decline. He remarked: Alright, here’s one: how about Walmart? Did you see that? At one point, it was down 5%. Closed down 3.9% today. Do you […]
